title: Airbus — Commercial Aircraft
notes: Airbus designs, builds and supports commercial aircraft; portfolio includes passenger aircraft, freighters and services.

title: Airbus — Space
notes: Airbus space portfolio: Earth observation, telecom/navigation satellites, exploration, ground systems, space equipment and support.

title: Airbus — Defence
notes: Airbus defence portfolio: military aircraft, UAS, FCAS, military space, connectivity, intelligence/data.

title: Boeing — Commercial
notes: Boeing commercial aircraft portfolio includes 737 MAX, 777, 777X, 787 and freighters.

title: Boeing — Space
notes: Boeing space systems: satellites, launch/space systems and government space products.

title: Boeing — Services
notes: Boeing Global Services supports commercial and government aircraft, sustainment and training.

title: Safran — Aerospace
notes: Safran aerospace portfolio: aircraft engines, equipment, interiors, landing systems, electrical and avionics.

title: Safran Aircraft Engines
notes: Safran Aircraft Engines develops, produces and supports aircraft engines.

title: CFM International
notes: CFM International is the 50/50 joint company of GE Aerospace and Safran Aircraft Engines.

title: GE Aerospace — Commercial Aircraft Engines & Services
notes: GE Aerospace commercial aircraft engines and services.

title: Rolls-Royce — Civil Aerospace
notes: Rolls-Royce civil aerospace products and services.

title: Pratt & Whitney
notes: Aircraft engines and propulsion systems.

title: Collins Aerospace
notes: Avionics, aircraft systems, interiors, mission systems and aerospace technology.

title: Raytheon
notes: RTX business with air, land, sea, space, integrated air defense and advanced technology capabilities.

title: Honeywell Aerospace Technologies
notes: Aerospace products, services, software, avionics, navigation, connectivity, engines/APU support and customer portal.

title: Thales — Aerospace
notes: Aerospace avionics, connectivity, air traffic management, flight deck and systems.

title: Leonardo — Aeronautics
notes: Leonardo aeronautics portfolio: aircraft, UAVs, aerostructures and support.

title: Dassault Aviation — Group
notes: Dassault Aviation corporate and aircraft portfolio context.

title: Embraer
notes: Brazilian aerospace company producing commercial, executive and defense aircraft.

title: COMAC
notes: Chinese commercial aircraft manufacturer.

title: Bombardier
notes: Business jet manufacturer and services provider.

title: Gulfstream Aerospace
notes: Business aviation aircraft manufacturer.

title: Textron Aviation
notes: Cessna, Beechcraft and Hawker aircraft ecosystem.

title: SpaceX
notes: Launch, spacecraft and Starlink satellite constellation company.

title: Blue Origin
notes: Launch vehicles, engines and space systems.

title: Rocket Lab
notes: Launch and space systems company.

title: Arianespace
notes: European launch services provider.

title: ArianeGroup
notes: European space launch and propulsion company.

title: European Space Agency
notes: European intergovernmental space agency.

title: EASA — European Union Aviation Safety Agency

title: FAA

title: ICAO

title: EUROCONTROL

title: IATA

title: NASA

title: Eutelsat Group
notes: European satellite operator, including GEO/LEO connectivity after OneWeb combination.

title: SES

title: Intelsat
notes: Satellite communications provider.

title: Thales Alenia Space
